decision.reason: A bounded review packet is ready. It references the existing 97,686-row source report and provides an explicitly marked editable copy for review notes only.

review_instructions.editable_copy_rule: Only the EDITABLE copy may be modified during review. The source repair report remains read-only evidence.
review_instructions.scoring_boundary: Reviewer notes are evidence intake only and are not GF0017 scores.
review_instructions.unicode_first_rule: Confirm char and Unicode before any structure/decomposition note.
